DESIGN

POWERFUL
PERFORMANCE

OUTSTANDING
SAFETY

REVOLUTIONARY
INTELLIGENCE

TOTAL
COMFORT

START YOUR DRIVE

Play Video

Dual Tone Exterior

Stand out from the rest with exceptional style.

Dual Tone Interior

A sporty, contemporary appearance that’s modernised for today’s taste.

72-Colour Rhythmic Ambient Light

Tailor your driving experience with ambient lighting, creating a cool and exciting cabin atmosphere of your choice.

Premium Soft Touch Interior

Experience luxury in every touch, now with crafted stitching pattern leatherette trim.

Floating Floor Console

Maximised cabin space that allows for more storage without compromising comfort.

Full LED Headlamps with Daytime Running Lamps

Light the way forward in any condition.

Front Welcome Lamps

Lights that welcome you into your exclusive space.

18" Alloy Wheels

Our newly designed alloy wheels feature two-tone finishing and diamond-cut pattern, delivering truly dynamic motion.

Sporty Spoiler

Built for aerodynamic performance with a stylish, sporty design.

Full LED Rear Tail Light Bar

A futuristic rear tail light bar that adds a contemporary touch.

Quad Exhaust Tailpipes

A sporty finish with the elegance of chrome.

i-GT 1.5TD Engine

Smoother and more eco-friendly than ever, the engine has been optimised to deliver 181PS and 290Nm of torque.

7-Speed Dual Clutch Transmission (DCT)

Shift gears faster, smoother and more efficiently with the best DCT in the class.

Steering Mode Selection

Personalise every drive by changing steering feel with Normal, Comfort, and Sport modes.

Drive Mode Selection

With the new Adaptive mode, you now have 4 modes to choose from to better suit your drives.

Electric Parking Brake and Auto Brake Hold

Automatically engages the brake to secure a safe position when coming to a standstill.

Remote Engine Start

Warm up the engine and cool down your cabin before even entering the vehicle.

Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB)

and Forward Collision Warning (FCW)

Smart risk reduction of potential frontal collisions via automatic braking. Proximity alert to assist drivers in avoiding potential frontal collisions.

Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) with

Stop & Go

Speed and distance detection from the vehicle ahead with pre-set cruise control speed, even in stop-and-go traffic.

Intelligent Cruise Control (ICC)

Keeps the vehicle in the centre of the lane with ACC through steering assistance.

Lane Keep Assist (LKA)

• Lane Departure Warning (LDW)
• Lane Departure Prevention (LDP)
• Lane Centering Control (LCC)

Traffic Sign Information (TSI)

Detects, identifies, and displays vital traffic signs for a safer driving experience.

Intelligent High Beam Control (IHBC)

Automatic swap between low and high beams when other vehicles are nearby.

Lane Change Assist (LCA)

Blind spot surveillance with indicator lights to assist drivers in changing lanes.

Rear Collision Warning (RCW)

Alerts driver of potential rear collisions and automatically activates hazard lights to alert the incoming vehicle.

Rear Cross Traffic Alert (RCTA)

Detects approaching nearby vehicles in the rear and sides when reversing.

Door Opening Warning (DOW)

Risk reduction of collision when opening the door through audio alerts and warning lights.

Auto Park Assist (APA)

Intelligent self-parking system that allows easy parking with your own programmable parking lines.

360° HD Camera + 180° Transparent View

Full surround view that displays the top, sides, and bottom of the vehicle ensure you are given a full view of your surroundings.

6 SRS Airbags

Deploys upon collisions to protect and reduce the risk of injury.

Tyre Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS)

Real-time display of tyre pressure and temperatures for a safer driving experience.

14.6” Infotainment Head Unit

Access all your digital needs with a wider and more responsive touchscreen monitor.

Voice Command (Bahasa Melayu and English)

The first Bahasa Melayu voice command that’s able to process multiple commands at once with a simple “Hi PROTON”.

Online Navigation

GPS navigation to help navigate the best routes and stay ahead.

Online Weather Forecast and Music Streaming

Play your favourite music and stay updated with weather updates.

Wireless Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto™

Seamless pairing with your preferred smart device via your choice of wireless or wired connection.

PROTON Link 2.0 Mobile App

Monitor your vehicle’s status remotely, activate specific functions, and reserve service appointments with just your smart device.

Automatic Column Shifter

The intuitive, modern column shifter offers easier access while freeing up more cabin space around the centre console.

Semi Transparent Sun Visors

Ergonomic protection against sunlight and glare without compromising visibility.

10L Under Console Storage

Spacious, practical, with easy access to store your items.

Panoramic Sunroof

Enjoy a panoramic view of the skies above with natural light.

Auto Rain Sensing Front Wipers

Ensure optimal visibility with automatic wipers that activate when it rains.

Power Tailgate

Open the tailgate automatically and effortlessly with the press of a button.

6-Way Driver Power Seat

Adjust to your preferred seating position for an optimum driving experience.

Wireless Charger

Keep your smart device charged with wireless quick charging, ergonomically designed for easy access.

4 USB Ports

Installed throughout the vehicle to ensure convenient charging for all passengers’ devices.

Rear Air Vents

Designed to ensure constant airflow throughout the cabin with rear foot blower.
